title.en: The S1G, mesh-detail, and FTM/ranging element family — sub-1 GHz IoT, mesh paths, and fine timing
title.zh: S1G、Mesh 细节与 FTM/测距元素家族——Sub-1 GHz 物联网、网状路径与精细定时

blocks.en: We have toured the mainstream and the millimeter-wave elements. What is left is a grab-bag of specialist families that each solve a very different problem: squeezing huge sensor networks into a narrow sub-1 GHz band (S1G / 802.11ah), wiring up multi-hop mesh forwarding, and turning Wi-Fi into a tape measure with fine-timing ranging (802.11az). This lesson is a guided survey — not deep field layouts, but a name-and-job tour so you can recognise each element when you meet it.
blocks.zh: 我们已经走过了主流元素和毫米波元素。剩下的是一批各自解决截然不同问题的“专业家族”：把海量传感器网络塞进狭窄的 Sub-1 GHz 频段（S1G / 802.11ah）、为多跳 Mesh 转发铺路、以及用精细定时测距把 Wi-Fi 变成一把“卷尺”（802.11az）。本课是一次导览式综述——不讲深层字段布局，而是“点名加说明职责”，让你日后遇到每个元素时都能认出它。

blocks.en: S1G (802.11ah, "HaLow") lives below 1 GHz where range is long but bandwidth is tiny, so its elements obsess over fitting thousands of devices into a thin pipe. The capability/operation/PHY block sets the ground rules: S1G Capabilities advertises what an S1G STA can do, S1G Operation carries operating parameters, S1G Beacon Compatibility lets legacy and S1G beacons coexist, Short Beacon Interval defines the rhythm of compact short beacons, Change Sequence is a counter that flags when critical-update info changed, S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index reports link margin without feedback, TSF Timer Accuracy declares clock precision, EL Operation governs extended-life low-power operation, MAD (Max Away Duration) bounds how long a STA may be absent, Header Compression shrinks repetitive MAC headers, and Authentication Control throttles the authentication-request storm when many devices wake at once.
blocks.zh: S1G（802.11ah，俗称 "HaLow"）工作在 1 GHz 以下，那里距离远但带宽极小，因此它的元素都执着于“把成千上万台设备塞进一根细管子”。能力/操作/PHY 这组奠定规则：S1G Capabilities 通告 S1G 站点的能力，S1G Operation 携带运行参数，S1G Beacon Compatibility 让传统信标与 S1G 信标共存，Short Beacon Interval 定义紧凑短信标的节奏，Change Sequence 是一个计数器、用于标记关键更新信息何时发生变化，S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index 在无反馈情况下上报链路余量，TSF Timer Accuracy 声明时钟精度，EL Operation 管理超长续航的低功耗运行，MAD（最大离开时长）限定站点可缺席多久，Header Compression 压缩重复的 MAC 头，而 Authentication Control 则在大量设备同时唤醒时抑制认证请求风暴。

blocks.en: The S1G addressing-and-paging family slices a giant population into manageable groups. AID Request, AID Response and AID Announcement hand out and announce tiny association IDs; RPS (Restricted Access Window Parameter Set) carves time into restricted windows so groups take turns; Page Slice divides the paging space so a device only wakes for its own slice; Sectorized Group ID List and S1G Sector Operation steer beams into spatial sectors to reuse the channel; SST and SST Operation drive Subchannel Selective Transmission across narrow subchannels; and UPSIM (Unified Power Save Idle Mode) defines an idle-mode power-save behaviour shared with other PHYs.
blocks.zh: S1G 的“寻址与寻呼”家族把庞大的设备群切成可管理的小组。AID Request、AID Response 和 AID Announcement 负责分配并通告微小的关联 ID；RPS（受限访问窗口参数集）把时间切成受限窗口，让各组轮流上场；Page Slice 划分寻呼空间，使设备只为自己那一“片”醒来；Sectorized Group ID List 与 S1G Sector Operation 把波束导向空间扇区以复用信道；SST 与 SST Operation 驱动子信道选择性发送（在窄子信道间切换）；而 UPSIM（统一省电空闲模式）定义了与其他 PHY 共用的空闲省电行为。

blocks.en: S1G relaying extends coverage by letting one STA forward for another. S1G Relay marks a relay's capability, S1G Relay Discovery helps a device find a relay, and S1G Relay Activation switches the relationship on. Reachable Address lists addresses reachable through the relay, and PV1 Probe Response Option tunes how the compact PV1 frame format answers probes. Together they let a far-edge sensor reach the AP through a hop.
blocks.zh: S1G 中继通过让一个站点替另一个站点转发来扩展覆盖。S1G Relay 标记中继能力，S1G Relay Discovery 帮助设备找到中继，S1G Relay Activation 则正式启用这一关系。Reachable Address 列出可经中继到达的地址，PV1 Probe Response Option 调整紧凑的 PV1 帧格式如何应答探测。它们共同让远在边缘的传感器通过一跳触达 AP。

blocks.en: The mesh-detail family wires up multi-hop forwarding. The MCCA (MCCA Opportunity) reservation set — MCCAOP Setup Request, MCCAOP Setup Reply, MCCAOP Advertisement, MCCAOP Advertisement Overview, and MCCAOP Teardown — negotiates and tears down collision-free time reservations between neighbours. Path selection runs on GANN (gate announcement), RANN (root announcement), PREQ (path request), PREP (path reply), and PERR (path error). Proxy info is published with PXU (proxy update) and PXUC (proxy update confirmation). Security and timing add Authenticated Mesh Peering Exchange (the AMPE secure-peering handshake), MIC (a message integrity check), and Beacon Timing (neighbour beacon schedule). Finally QMF Policy sets the QoS-management-frame policy and Intra-Access Category Priority refines priority inside a single access category.
blocks.zh: Mesh 细节家族负责铺设多跳转发。MCCA（MCCA 机会）预约这组——MCCAOP Setup Request、MCCAOP Setup Reply、MCCAOP Advertisement、MCCAOP Advertisement Overview 和 MCCAOP Teardown——在邻居之间协商并拆除无冲突的时间预约。路径选择则依赖 GANN（网关通告）、RANN（根通告）、PREQ（路径请求）、PREP（路径回复）和 PERR（路径错误）。代理信息通过 PXU（代理更新）和 PXUC（代理更新确认）发布。安全与定时再加上 Authenticated Mesh Peering Exchange（AMPE 安全对等握手）、MIC（消息完整性校验）和 Beacon Timing（邻居信标时刻表）。最后，QMF Policy 设定 QoS 管理帧策略，Intra-Access Category Priority 在单个访问类别内部细化优先级。

blocks.en: The ranging family (802.11az FTM) carries the back-and-forth timing samples that turn Wi-Fi into a tape measure. FTM Parameters sets up a fine-timing session and FTM Synchronization Information aligns clocks. The trigger-based passive flow reports through ISTA Passive TB Ranging Measurement Report and RSTA Passive TB Ranging Measurement Report, with location context in the Passive TB Ranging LCI Table. ISTA Availability Window and RSTA Availability Window negotiate when each side is listening. PASN Parameters carries pre-association security negotiation, and Ranging Parameters holds the general ranging configuration. For angle and signal quality: Direction Measurement Results reports measured direction, Multiple AOD Feedback returns several angle-of-departure estimates, Multiple Best AWV ID lists the best beam (antenna weight vector) choices, LOS Likelihood scores how line-of-sight the path is, and Secure HE-LTF Parameters protects the training fields the measurements ride on.
blocks.zh: 测距家族（802.11az FTM）承载来回的定时采样，把 Wi-Fi 变成一把卷尺。FTM Parameters 建立精细定时会话，FTM Synchronization Information 对齐时钟。基于触发的被动流程通过 ISTA Passive TB Ranging Measurement Report 与 RSTA Passive TB Ranging Measurement Report 上报，位置上下文放在 Passive TB Ranging LCI Table 中。ISTA Availability Window 与 RSTA Availability Window 协商各方何时收听。PASN Parameters 承载关联前安全协商，Ranging Parameters 保存通用测距配置。在角度与信号质量方面：Direction Measurement Results 上报实测方向，Multiple AOD Feedback 返回多个出发角估计，Multiple Best AWV ID 列出最佳波束（天线权向量）选择，LOS Likelihood 给出路径有多“视距”的评分，而 Secure HE-LTF Parameters 则保护测量所依赖的训练字段。

blocks.en: A handful of stray newer elements round out the tour, mostly around enhanced broadcast/multicast and group keys. EBCS Parameters and EBCS TIM configure Enhanced Broadcast Service (sending data without association). GCR Group Address names the target of Groupcast-with-Retries, and GLK-GCR Parameter Set tunes GCR for the GLK (general link) case. Originator Preferred MCS lets a transmitter hint its preferred modulation/coding for group frames. On the security side, Diffie-Hellman Parameter carries DH key-exchange material and AKM Suite Selector names the authentication-and-key-management suite in use.
blocks.zh: 最后还有几个零散的新元素收尾，大多围绕增强广播/组播与组密钥。EBCS Parameters 和 EBCS TIM 配置增强广播服务（无需关联即可发送数据）。GCR Group Address 命名“带重传的组播”（Groupcast-with-Retries）的目标，GLK-GCR Parameter Set 则为 GLK（通用链路）场景调校 GCR。Originator Preferred MCS 让发送方为组帧提示其偏好的调制/编码。在安全方面，Diffie-Hellman Parameter 携带 DH 密钥交换材料，AKM Suite Selector 命名当前使用的认证与密钥管理套件。

blocks.en: Mental shortcut: read the family by its prefix. "S1G…" and AID/RPS/Page/SST = sub-1 GHz IoT scaling; MCCAOP/PREQ/PREP/PERR/PXU = mesh forwarding; FTM/Ranging/AOD/LTF = az fine-timing measurement; EBCS/GCR = enhanced broadcast. You rarely need the bytes — you need to know which family a TLV belongs to.
blocks.zh: 记忆捷径：看前缀认家族。"S1G…" 以及 AID/RPS/Page/SST = Sub-1 GHz 物联网扩展；MCCAOP/PREQ/PREP/PERR/PXU = Mesh 转发；FTM/Ranging/AOD/LTF = az 精细定时测量；EBCS/GCR = 增强广播。你很少需要逐字节细节——你需要的是判断某个 TLV 属于哪个家族。

summary.en: Where these elements live in the Element ID table
summary.zh: 这些元素在 Element ID 表中的位置

blocks.en: All of these are entries in Table 9-130 (Element IDs). The mesh and S1G families mostly use single-octet Element IDs: e.g. Beacon Timing = 120, MCCAOP Setup Request = 121, GANN = 125, RANN = 126, PREQ/PREP/PERR = 130/131/132, PXU/PXUC = 137/138, FTM Parameters = 206, and the S1G block runs from 207 (S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index) up through 235 (MAD) and 236 (S1G Relay Activation). The ranging and EBCS-era elements, by contrast, are reached through Element ID = 255 plus an Element ID Extension octet — for instance FTM Synchronization Information is 255/9, the passive TB ranging reports are 255/95 and 255/96, PASN Parameters is 255/100, LOS Likelihood is 255/105, EBCS Parameters/TIM are 255/111-112, AKM Suite Selector is 255/114, Diffie-Hellman Parameter is 255/32, GLK-GCR Parameter Set is 255/34, and Originator Preferred MCS is 255/116. The single-octet space ran low, so newer elements borrow the extension namespace.
blocks.zh: 这些全都是 Table 9-130（Element IDs）中的条目。Mesh 与 S1G 家族大多使用单字节 Element ID：例如 Beacon Timing = 120、MCCAOP Setup Request = 121、GANN = 125、RANN = 126、PREQ/PREP/PERR = 130/131/132、PXU/PXUC = 137/138、FTM Parameters = 206，而 S1G 这一段从 207（S1G Open-Loop Link Margin Index）一直延伸到 235（MAD）和 236（S1G Relay Activation）。相比之下，测距与 EBCS 时代的元素则通过 Element ID = 255 再加一个 Element ID Extension 字节来表示——例如 FTM Synchronization Information 是 255/9，被动 TB 测距报告是 255/95 与 255/96，PASN Parameters 是 255/100，LOS Likelihood 是 255/105，EBCS Parameters/TIM 是 255/111-112，AKM Suite Selector 是 255/114，Diffie-Hellman Parameter 是 255/32，GLK-GCR Parameter Set 是 255/34，Originator Preferred MCS 是 255/116。单字节空间已经告罄，因此较新的元素借用了扩展命名空间。

cites.note: Table 9-130 Element IDs — mesh detail (120-140) and S1G block (206-236) single-octet entries
Table 9-130 Element IDs — Element ID Extension (255/x) entries: FTM Sync, ranging/PASN/AOD/LTF, EBCS, GCR, DH, AKM
